text:
is a Cadet Corps cadet.

Appearance

Jean has a slight undercut that is colored differently to his hair, which is quail brown. He has furrowed brows and light hazel swirly eyes. He wears the typical cadet uniform.

Personality

Jean is envious and spiteful, but ultimately he wants to show that he is fit to live life peacefully in the interior after joining the corps. His uppity behavior makes him unapproachable for most.

Story

Relationships

Marco Bodt - Unlike most, Marco is very accepting of Jean as a whole, and Jean shows more tolerance towards Marco. Though they have little in common, they work well together as friends and cadets.
